name: Morphous Katydid
motif: leaf wing with fine vein lattice
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Katydid light and dark design-system boards: discreet collaboration surfaces, leaf-green actions, lime focus rings, dark olive structure, translucent wing panels, and fine vein dividers.
typography: Inter Variable for compact product UI with Hiragino Sans and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, calm collaboration copy, and dense dashboard data.
layout: Precise 4px spacing steps, 8px maximum radius, fine vein-like separators, translucent wing panels, compact navigation, quiet dashboard modules, and restrained status hierarchy.
